title: Convert VCF to CSV in your browser, free, no upload

segments.voice: Got a VCF file of contacts exported from your phone, Google Contacts, or Outlook?

scene.headline:
A VCF file
of contacts
scene.sub: exported from iPhone, Android, Google, or Outlook

segments.voice: But you need it as a spreadsheet to clean it up, remove duplicates, or import it somewhere.

scene.headline:
You need a
spreadsheet
scene.sub: names, emails, phones in sortable rows

segments.voice: Your contacts are private. This converts them without uploading anything.

scene.headline:
Your contacts
stay on your device
scene.sub: nothing is sent to a server

segments.voice: Free. No signup. Nothing to install.
Go to twineconvert dot com slash vcf to csv.
Drop the dot vcf file. Click convert. Open the CSV in Excel or Google Sheets.
Link's in the bio, give it a try!
